heading: The Shardstone Core.
intro:
We are an independent publisher of storytelling games and fantastical worlds designed to push the boundaries of imagination.

**Quality.** Every product we put out, be it digital or physical, will be high in quality and something you can be proud of having.

**Story.** When designing our games, we always ensure to create tools that craft exciting and fresh stories.

**Diversity.** Our products are for everyone, and representation can be found both in our creative team and in our games.

members.name: Andi
members.bio: **Alexandru** (he/him) aka "**_Dominus_**" is a concept artist and illustrator, passionate about creating fantastic art and worlds, interested in video games and visual aesthetics. He worked as a senior artist and art director in the video games industry. Alexandru was born in Braila, Romania, but now he draws his inspiration living in Stockholm, Sweden.

members.name: Marquis
members.bio: **Marquis** (he/they) is a writer who finds their passion in the intersection of weird ideas, the occult, and the human experience. Their career includes editing and consultation for tabletop games and novels, as well as freelance writing on a suite of projects. Marquis graduated with their MA in English in 2020, and currently lives in Charlotte, North Carolina.
